name: Scaleway (European Cloud Platform API)
pricing_notes: Pay-as-you-go; competitive EU pricing; generous free tiers

auth.notes: Secret Key + Organization ID. X-Auth-Token header.

performance.notes: EU-based data centers; 80ms from Europe, 200ms+ from US

agent_readiness.notes: European cloud provider (French company). Instances, Kubernetes (Kapsule), Functions (serverless), Object Storage, Databases (PG/MySQL/Redis), Container Registry, Block Storage, Domains. GDPR-compliant EU data residency. Instances from €0.006/hr. TypeScript SDK: @scaleway/sdk. Terraform provider. CLI: scw. IAM with granular policies. GPU instances for AI workloads. Popular among EU startups and GDPR-sensitive businesses.

gotchas: Smaller ecosystem than AWS/GCP (fewer managed services)
Some services in beta longer than expected
best_when: Startups wanting competitive EU pricing vs Hetzner's managed services
Apps needing EU data residency guarantees
GPU compute for AI workloads with EU data requirements
avoid_when: Need broad managed service catalog (AWS has 200+ services)
summary: Scaleway is a French cloud provider with EU data residency. Instances, Kubernetes (Kapsule), Functions, Object Storage, Managed DBs, GPU instances. GDPR-compliant. TypeScript SDK, Terraform provider, CLI. Competitive EU pricing. Popular with EU startups needing data sovereignty. No US regions — choose Hetzner for price, OVH for scale, or Scaleway for managed service breadth in EU.
